description: A person has run past the gate agent without a valid boarding pass. The agent must initiate a security response.

nodes.task_description: Immediately notify airport security or police of the breach, providing a description of the person.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes an immediate and clear report to security.
Agent halts boarding to prevent further issues.

nodes.task_description: If the person boarded the aircraft, coordinate with the flight crew to have all passengers deplane for a full security sweep.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the crew to initiate a deplaning and security check.
